summary: First iteration — comprehensive backend + frontend testing of Crypto Beginner MVP. All 13 backend API tests pass (13/13). All frontend critical flows (home, navbar, learn tracks + detail, dictionary search/alphabet, blog list + detail, contact form submission with success state, legal pages, custom 404, mobile responsiveness) pass. No blocking bugs found.

ui_bugs.issue: text_content joins inline spans producing 'Learn CryptoFrom Zero.' (visual rendering is correct, but consider adding a space or aria-label so screen readers/snapshot tools read it with a space between 'Crypto' and 'From')
Brand link/logo does not expose a data-testid='nav-brand' attribute. Visible text 'Crypto Beginner' renders correctly. Adding the testid would help future automation.

action_items: (Optional/Low) Add data-testid='nav-brand' to the brand element in Navbar.jsx for cleaner future tests.
(Optional/Low) Add a space between the 'Crypto' and 'From' inline tokens in the hero H1 to improve accessible text content.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown'). Consider migrating to lifespan context manager for future FastAPI versions.
CoinGecko module-level _market_cache/_global_cache is in-memory only; in a multi-worker deploy each worker has its own cache. Fine for single-worker preview but flag for production scaling.
Pydantic v2 in use: EmailStr correctly returns 422 on invalid email. Good.
All Mongo finds correctly project away _id. Async/await used consistently. Good.

DB seeding inside startup mutates BLOG_POSTS dicts (assigning id/created_at) — idempotent only because the count==0 guard exists; if collection is partially cleared the mutation would still set ids fine, but BLOG_POSTS module-level list is now stateful. Minor.
seed_data_creation: Backend seeds lessons, blog (8), glossary (55) at startup if collections empty. Contact submission created during test (TEST_User) — left in DB; no PII.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All endpoints under /api/* respond 200 via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL. CoinGecko is cached 55s server-side; data may be 'cached:true' on repeated calls. data-testids verified working: hero-cta-start, hero-cta-market, nav-{dashboard,learn,dictionary,blog,about,contact}, coin-row-* (10 rows), level-tab-{beginner,intermediate,security}, lesson-card-what-is-bitcoin, dictionary-search, alphabet-bar, term-* (55), blog-card-*, blog-categories, contact-{name,email,subject,message,submit,success}, mobile-menu-toggle, page-404. Market stat cards use testids stat-market-cap, stat-btc-dominance, stat-active-coins, stat-volume (NOT stat-card-*). nav-brand testid is NOT present.
rca of the issue: No bugs found requiring RCA. Two non-blocking observations recorded under ui_bugs.
